#   {.unnumbered .unlisted}

```{=latex}
\setstretch{1.5}
\begin{center}
{\Huge\textbf{Manuscript}}
\end{center}
\clearpage

\clearpage

\vspace*{1.2cm}
{\raggedright
\vspace{0.15cm}
{\fontsize{16}{20}\selectfont
Heterogeneity in GLP-1, GIP and glucagon responses during an oral glucose
tolerance test among individuals at high risk of type 2 diabetes: The
ADDITION-PRO study\par}

\nointerlineskip
\vspace{-0.10cm}
\noindent\rule{\textwidth}{0.4pt}

\nointerlineskip
\vspace{0.05cm}
{\fontsize{14}{16}\selectfont{Running title:} Homonal responses among high-risk individuals\par}

\vspace*{12.2cm}
\noindent
\begin{minipage}[t]{1\textwidth}
\fontsize{12}{15}\selectfont
\textbf{Corresponding author:} Mikkel Errboe Steentoft\\
\textbf{Affiliation:} Health Science MSc student, Department of Public Health, Aarhus University and Steno Diabetes Center Aarhus, Denmark\\
\textbf{Email:} Milram@rm.dk\\
\textbf{Word count:} [xxxx]\\
\textbf{Number of tables:} 2\\
\textbf{Number of figures:} 2
\end{minipage}
\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.22\textwidth}
\end{minipage}
```
